title: CustomItemGenerators
description: A Slimefun addon that allows you to create custom item generators from a simple config entry.
body:
CustomItemGenerators is a Slimefun addon that allows users to create fully customizable item generators via YAML configuration files. The plugin supports integration with all existing Slimefun addons, making it highly adaptable.

Users can define generator properties such as the block type, name, lore, energy capacity, and recipe. Additionally, the plugin allows configuration of a list of production outputs, energy consumption, and crafting time. There is a also a file to change the display of all the Custom Item Generators in case you find the GUI too limited.
